title: NXR Subject Store
description: Root profile of a stateful `<subject>.nxr.zarr` store. The store is one document that grows over the data lifecycle: import -> eigenmodes -> forward -> inverse -> analysis. It has up to four top-level component groups, each its own versioned kind. Only `manifold` is required to call a store well-formed; the rest are filled in as the pipeline progresses. Each component group also carries its own root `schema` attribute and is independently valid (and cross-referenceable) as a standalone store.

modified_utc.description: ISO-8601 last-modified timestamp (updated by CRUD writes).

nxr_io_version.description: nxr-io build that last wrote the store.

field.description: Signals defined on the manifold (source space). May hold multiple named field sub-groups.

maps.description: Forward + inverse operators relating recordings <-> field.
